titleStmt.title: SII 37.60: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 60. (A.R. No. B 430 of 1938-39.) Vallūru, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Śiva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1475 (current), Pramādīcha, Vaiśākha śu. 3, corresponding to 1553 A.D., April 15, Saturday.

It registers the grant of vīra-mushṭi-pannu due from the vīrasmushṭis of the villages Pushpagiri and Peda Vallūru in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma by Maṁḍala Basavaya for the merit of Śiddhabhikshā-vṛitti-ayya and other devotees for maintaining lamp offerings to god Vīrēśvara of Vallūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudda
ya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁ
bbulu 1475 Agunēṭi pramā
dīca saṁvvatsara vayiśākha
śu 3 lu svasti . śrī parvata śrī sva
yaṁbhū śrīliṁga cakrava¨rtti śrī
maṁnmahāliṁgadēva divyaśrīpādapadmārādha
kulaina śrīkailāsaṁ mīdi dēvāpṛthivī mahāmaha
ttumukhyamaina Ajāti vīrasiva mūṁḍu
rāyala pūjaliṁga siddha bhikṣāvriti A
yyavāri Ajñadhārulaina maṁḍalabasva
yyagāru bhikṣāvriti Ayyavāripuṇyaṁgā
nu voḍayala bhaktulakuṁ puṇyaṁggānu guṁṭiliṁga
yya koḍkuyammaja liṁggayya guṁṭirācayya siṁggā
raṁ vīraya māmiḍivīrayya modalaina vīramuṣṭulu
puṇyaṁgānu vallūri vīraṇa dīpārādhanaku dā
ravōsi Iccina dha¨rmmaśāsanakramameṭlayinā
nu gaṁḍikōṭasīmalōnu puṣpagiri brā
pedavalūri grāmānanu Ace vīra
ṁnnuvīrēśvaruni dīpārādha
diya puṇyakālamaṁ

dhārvōsi yistimi yī vī
rēśvaruni dīpārādhana naḍa
pakuṁnānu vīramuṣṭuya
varu tapinānu śivācāra kā
lācāra vibhūti rudrākṣa
laku gaṁga A gōbrāhma
lavadhiyiṁcina pāpāna bō
vuvāru Ani yicina dhaṁ¨rmma
śāsanaṁ . svadattā dviguṇa
ṁpuṇyaṁ paradattānupā
lanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa
svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu .
śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
